/usr/bin/ar qc libbinexport_core.a CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/address_references.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/base_types.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/basic_block.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/binexport2_writer.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/call_graph.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/comment.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/dump_writer.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/edge.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/entry_point.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/expression.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/flow_analysis.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/flow_graph.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/function.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/instruction.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/library_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/operand.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/statistics_writer.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/version.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/virtual_memory.cc.o CMakeFiles/binexport_core.dir/x86_nop.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbinexport_core.a
